---
title: "t_contrast"
generated: true
description: "Per-element t-test of a linear contrast $c^{ top}  beta$."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:t_contrast -->
```python
t_contrast(result: GLMResult, contrast: Float[Array, 'p'], *, cov: Optional[Float[Array, '... p p']] = None) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:t_contrast -->
Per-element t-test of a linear contrast $c^{\top} \beta$.

Computes, for every element, the contrast estimate, its standard error, the
t statistic, and the two-sided p-value at `result.dof_resid` degrees of
freedom (the ModelArray `lm` columns `estimate` / `std.error` /
`statistic` / `p.value`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:t_contrast -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `result` | `GLMResult` | — | — | A fitted `GLMResult` supplying the coefficients, unscaled covariance, dispersion, and residual degrees of freedom. |
| `contrast` | `Float` | `p` | — | `(p,)` contrast vector $c$; the tested effect is $c^{\top} \beta$. |
| `cov` | `Optional[Float[Array, '... p p']]` | — | `None` | Optional coefficient covariance override, either a shared `(p, p)` or a per-element `(V, p, p)` matrix -- e.g. the robust output of `sandwich_cov`. When given, the variance is $c^{\top} \Sigma\, c$ taken directly (already on the variance scale). The default (`None`) uses the model-based covariance $\mathrm{dispersion} \cdot (X^{\top} W X)^{-1}$. |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V']]`. `(V,)` contrast estimate $c^{\top} \beta$. `(V,)` standard error of the contrast. `(V,)` t statistic `effect / se`. `(V,)` two-sided p-value at `result.dof_resid` degrees of freedom.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:t_contrast -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
